privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetically generated dataset of meteorite landings dynamically created in setup_task.sh. Independent code analysis confirms the dataset has 16 valid mass entries out of 19 total rows. The top 3 meteorites by mass are indeed Hoba, Campo del Cielo, and Cape York. The exact arithmetic mean of all 16 valid masses is 21653608.81. The input, script, and output file paths are explicitly verified against the task scripts.
